item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-07)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41400 Trending skills: 16912 Hot skills: 2284 Top All Time: find-skills (436052) Top Trending: find-skills (13410) Top Hot: sleek-design-mobile-apps (584)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#43): systematic-debugging
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 23940 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#44): docx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 23377 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#45): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 22070 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#46): xlsx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 21993 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#47): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 20463 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#48): agent-email-cli
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 20084 Source: zaddy6/agent-email-skill Description: Operate the agent-email CLI to create disposable inboxes, poll for new mail, retrieve full message details, and manage local mailbox profiles. Use when the user needs terminal-based email inbox access for LLM or agent automation workflows.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#49): test-driven-development
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 19729 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#50): webapp-testing
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 19425 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 59 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): agent browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 59 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): super-swarm-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit super-swarm-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): tdd-test-writer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 59 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Writes failing tests first for test-driven development and hands off a strict implementation contract that requires agents to make those tests pass without weakening the tests. Use when users ask for test-first workflows, RED/GREEN cycles, or behavior-gating tasks with automated tests.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): gemini-computer-use
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Build and run Gemini 2.5 Computer Use browser-control agents with Playwright. Use when a user wants to automate web browser tasks via the Gemini Computer Use model, needs an agent loop (screenshot → function_call → action → function_response), or asks to integrate safety confirmation for risky UI actions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): swarm-planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): llm-council
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Orchestrate a configurable, multi-member CLI planning council (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, OpenCode, or custom) to produce independent implementation plans, anonymize and randomize them, then judge and merge into one final plan. Use when you need a robust, bias-resistant planning workflow, structured JSON outputs, retries, and failure handling across multiple CLI agents.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): parallel-task-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit /parallel-task-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): role-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 58 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create and install Codex custom agent roles in ~/.codex/config.toml, generate role config files, enforce supported keys, and guide users through required role inputs (model, reasoning effort, developer_instructions).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): context7
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 61 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 API. Use PROACTIVELY when: (1) Working with ANY external library (React, Next.js, Supabase, etc.) (2) User asks about library APIs, patterns, or best practices (3) Implementing features that rely on third-party packages (4) Debugging library-specific issues (5) Need current documentation beyond training data cutoff (6) AND MOST IMPORTANTLY, when you are installing dependencies, libraries, or frameworks you should ALWAYS check the docs to see what the latest versions are. Do not rely on outdated knowledge. Always prefer this over guessing library APIs or using outdated knowledge.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 59 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): vet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 54 Source: imbue-ai/vet Description: Run vet immediately after ANY logical unit of code changes. Do not batch your changes, do not wait to be asked to run vet, make sure you are proactive.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): task-planning
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Plan and organize software development tasks effectively. Use when breaking down features, creating user stories, or planning sprints. Handles task breakdown, user stories, acceptance criteria, and backlog management.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): workflow-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 56 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate repetitive development tasks and workflows. Use when creating build scripts, automating deployments, or setting up development workflows. Handles npm scripts, Makefile, GitHub Actions workflows, and task automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): image-generation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate high-quality images via MCP (Gemini models or compatible services) using structured prompts, ratios, and validation for marketing, UI, or presentations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): api-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 50 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs following best practices. Use when creating new APIs, refactoring existing endpoints, or documenting API specifications. Handles OpenAPI, REST, GraphQL, versioning.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): web-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 49 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 48 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Systematically debug code issues using proven methodologies. Use when encountering errors, unexpected behavior, or performance problems. Handles error analysis, root cause identification, debugging strategies, and fix verification.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): code-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 49 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct thorough, constructive code reviews for quality and security. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, identifying bugs, or auditing security. Handles best practices, SOLID principles, security vulnerabilities, performance analysis, and testing coverage.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): deployment-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 49 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate application deployment to cloud platforms and servers. Use when setting up CI/CD pipelines, deploying to Docker/Kubernetes, or configuring cloud infrastructure. Handles GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Vercel, and deployment best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 48 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): ralph
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Self-referential completion loop for AI CLI tools. Re-runs the agent on the same task across turns with fresh context each iteration, until the completion promise is detected or max iterations is reached.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): marketing-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate marketing deliverables across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth using 23 specialized sub-skills with clear objectives, constraints, and validation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Fetches latest Vercel guidelines and checks files against all rules.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): prompt-repetition
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: LLM 정확도 향상을 위한 프롬프트 반복 기법. 70개 벤치마크 중 67%(47/70)에서 유의미한 성능 향상 달성. 경량 모델(haiku, flash, mini)에서 자동 적용.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use for website interaction, form automation, screenshots, scraping, and web app verification. Prefer snapshot refs (@e1, @e2) for deterministic actions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): task-estimation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): authentication-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): codebase-search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Search and navigate large codebases efficiently. Use when finding specific code patterns, tracing function calls, understanding code structure, or locating bugs. Handles semantic search, grep patterns, AST analysis.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): user-guide-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear and helpful user guides and tutorials for end users. Use when creating onboarding docs, how-to guides, or FAQ pages. Handles user-focused documentation, screenshots, step-by-step instructions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): plan-harder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 61 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Use when user specfically says 'plan harder'.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): pollinations-ai
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 47 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate and save images using Pollinations.ai's free, open-source API. No signup required. Supports URL-based generation, custom parameters (width, height, model, seed), and automatic file saving. Perfect for quick prototypes, marketing assets, and creative workflows.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): ai-tool-compliance
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: 내부 AI 툴 필수 구현 가이드(P0/P1) 기반으로 권한, 비용, 로그, 보안 컴플라이언스를 설계-검증-개선하는 자동화 스킬. RBAC 설계, Gateway 원칙, Firestore 정책, 행동 로그, 비용 투명성, 기준검증 시스템의 전체 라이프사이클을 지원한다.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): jeo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: JEO — 통합 AI 에이전트 오케스트레이션 스킬. ralph+plannotator로 계획 수립, team/bmad로 실행, agent-browser로 브라우저 동작 검증, 작업 완료 후 worktree 자동 정리. Claude, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode 모두 지원. 설치: ralph, omc, omx, ohmg, bmad, plannotator, agent-browser.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): npm-git-install
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Install npm packages directly from GitHub repositories using git URLs. Use when installing packages from private repos, specific branches, or unreleased versions not yet on npm registry.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): pattern-detection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): sprint-retrospective
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): system-environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure development and production environments for consistent and reproducible setups. Use when setting up new projects, Docker environments, or development tooling. Handles Docker Compose, .env configuration, dev containers, and infrastructure as code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): llm-monitoring-dashboard
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: PM용 관리자 대시보드에 LLM 사용 모니터링 페이지를 자동 생성. Tokuin CLI 기반 토큰/비용/레이턴시 추적 + 사용자 랭킹 시스템 + 비사용자 추적 + 데이터 기반 PM 인사이트 자동 생성 + Cmd+K 글로벌 검색 + 사용자별 드릴다운 링크 탐색 포함. OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenRouter 지원.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): genkit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 46 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build production-ready AI workflows using Firebase Genkit. Use when creating flows, tool-calling agents, RAG pipelines, multi-agent systems, or deploying AI to Firebase/Cloud Run. Supports TypeScript, Go, and Python with Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and Vertex AI plugins.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 61 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.
